GayBoy - Today at 6:29 AM @everyone Hello everybody, just a quick announcement about the future of the discord. The great Armorsmith lost accsess to his account because of his actions against quj in a different server. He's currently working on transfering the ownership of the discord to me. The server, however, will continue to operate as normal, and the new official owner right now is ME. If you break the rules, you will still be banned, and the only bad thing that happened now as a result is that Armorsmith's Followers job system is in a delay and will be introduced after the drama is over. Other then that, business is as usual. I'll announce who wins the giveaway later. Armorsmith doesn't have any temp account so the only way to contact him now is on 2b2t. Worship Armorsmith every day!

Deleted User 18-Oct-18 03:08 AM
2 days ago it was announced that VoCo Members who are affiliated with Jared's Incursion Reloaded would be removed from VoCo within 48 hours. Today, 12 members who had not renounced their Incursion ranks had their VoCo roles removed. These members were not banned or kicked from the VoCo discord, and were allowed the opportunity to leave Jared's Incursion and get their roles back. TheJumpyBlaze, who has been working closely with Jared, was upset that his ranks were removed, and refused to renounce his Incursion ranks. He then left the VoCo discord and began spreading misinformation that I had banned all Emperium members from the VoCo discord; and then started insinuating that the VoPerium alliance is over.
Deleted User 18-Oct-18 03:57 AM
This caused a couple of other Emperium members to leave the VoCo discord and begin spreading anti-VoCo sentiment in the Emperium and Incursion discords. This misinformation included notions that VoCo had banned several VoCo & Emperium members and that many VoCo members were joining Emperium.

Deleted User 18-Oct-18 04:46 AM
2 days ago it was announced that VoCo Members who are affiliated with Jared's "Incursion Reloaded" would be removed from VoCo within 48 hours for working with known enemies of The Vortex Coalition, which goes against the VoCo TOS Section VI Rule 2. Today, 12 Vortex Coalition Members had their roles removed. These members were not banned or kicked from the VoCo discord, and were allowed the opportunity to leave Jared's "Incursion" and get their roles back. TheJumpyBlaze, who has been working closely with Jared and his "Incursion", was upset that his ranks were removed, and refused to renounce his Incursion ranks. He then left the VoCo discord and began spreading misinformation that Emperium members were banned from the VoCo discord, and began insinuating that the VoPerium alliance was over. This caused animosity among Emperium members, and pressured a couple to leave the VoCo discord. Anti-VoCo sentiment and misinformation began to spread in the Emperium and Incursion discords as well. This misinformation included notions that VoCo had banned several VoCo & Emperium members and that many VoCo members were joining Emperium. As of now, there is still a strong alliance between The Vortex Coalition and Emperium members, and you are advised to disregard baseless accounts of bans against other members. Spreading misinformation will lead to probation and/or eventually being banned, which has been the case for a couple of members during this situation. To be clear: The state of the VoPerium Alliance is good, and stronger than ever. (edited)

sorry I thought you posted your's already
no i wanted us to post at the exact same time..
2 days ago it was announced that VoCo Members who are affiliated with Jared's "Incursion Reloaded" Today, 12 Vortex Coalition Members had their roles removed. These members were not banned or kicked from the VoCo discord, and were allowed the opportunity to leave Jared's Incursion and get their roles back. TheJumpyBlaze, who has been working closely with Jared and his "Incursion", was upset that his ranks were removed, and refused to renounce his Incursion ranks. He then left the VoCo discord and began spreading misinformation that Emperium members were banned from the VoCo discord, and began insinuating that the VoPerium alliance was over. This caused animosity among Emperium members, and pressured a couple to leave the VoCo discord. Anti-VoCo sentiment and misinformation began to spread in the Emperium and Incursion discords as well. This misinformation included notions that VoCo had banned several VoCo & Emperium members and that many VoCo members were joining Emperium. As of now, there is still a strong alliance between The Vortex Coalition and Emperium members, and you are advised to disregard baseless accounts of bans against other members. Spreading misinformation is discouraged. To be clear: The state of the VoPerium Alliance is good, and stronger than ever.
